content: You're watching Madonna's "CONFESSIONS II - The Film". Directed by TORSO Produced by DIVISION Powered by DOLCE&GABBANA All songs taken from Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II, out July 3 2026. Pre-order here: https://Madonna.lnk.to/Confessions2 Subscribe to the Madonna Channel! https://Madonna.lnk.to/YouTubeID STARRING ARCA ARCHIE MADEKWE BENEDICT CUMBERBATCH COLE PALMER DEBI MAZAR FEID GWENDOLINE CHRISTIE HONEY DIJON JOAO PEDRO JULIA GARNER KATE MOSS ODESSA A'ZION RICHARD E. GRANT SABRINA CARPENTER SHYGIRL LOURDES LEON EXECUTIVE PRODUCERS GUY OSEARY ERNEST BOUVIER JULES DE CHATELEUX DOP DANIEL LANDIN PRODUCERS SARA ZAMBRENO MATHILDE HAMART MUSICAL DIRECTION BY STUART PRICE MAIN CHOREOGRAPHER: DAMIEN JALET MADONNA'S STYLIST: RITA MELSSEN WARDROBE BY: DOLCE&GABBANA GLOBAL STYLIST: AKEEM SMITH GOOD FOR THE SOUL CHOREOGRAPHY AND STYLING: YBDG PRODUCTION DESIGNER: ARTHUR DE BORMAN HEAD OF POST PRODUCTION: CLEMENCE CUVELIER POST HOUSE: MONUMENTAL EDITORS WILL TOWN LAUREN FRIEDMAN DANNY TULL COLORISTS ARTHUR PAUX NICOLAS GAUTIER MADONNA’S TEAM MAVERICK MANAGEMENT GUY OSEARY SARA ZAMBRENO GEORDON NICOL RACHEL GORDH TARA AHMADI ASSISTANT TO MADONNA: VANESSA SIRAVO PHOTOGRAPHER TO MADONNA: RICARDO GOMES Help Us Give Back… Raising Malawi http://www.raisingmalawi.org/ The Ray of Light Foundation http://www.rayoflight.org/ Stay in touch with Madonna… https://madonna.com https://instagram.com/madonna https://tiktok.com/@madonna https://x.com/madonna https://facebook.com/madonna https://www.madonna.com/newsletter The Madonna Channel is the official YouTube home for Madonna. As the best-selling female recording artist of all time, Madonna continues to leave an indelible mark on the world through her art, music, activism and humanitarian leadership. Madonna consistently pushes boundaries, spurs conversations and unites us all through her revolutionary work. Subscribe for the latest videos, music, news and updates. Enjoy Madonna’s groundbreaking music videos, live performances, humorous videos and more.
chineseContent: 您正在观看麦当娜的“Confessions II - The Film”。由 TORSO 执导 由 DIVISION 制作 由 DOLCE&GABBANA 提供支持 所有歌曲均取自 Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II，于 2026 年 7 月 3 日发行。在此预订：https://Madonna.lnk.to/Confessions2 订阅麦当娜频道！ https://Madonna.lnk.to/YouTubeID 主演：阿卡·阿奇 马德克韦 本尼迪克特·康伯巴奇 科尔·帕尔默 黛比·马扎尔·菲德 关多兰 克里斯蒂·霍尼 迪容 乔奥·佩德罗 朱莉娅·加纳 凯特·莫斯 敖德萨 A'Zion 理查德·E·格兰特 萨布丽娜·卡普特 施吉尔 卢尔德·莱昂 执行官制作人 GUY OSEARY ERNEST BOUVIER JULES DE CHATELEUX DOP DANIEL LANDIN 制作人 SARA ZAMBRENO MATHILDE HAMART 音乐总监 STUART PRICE 主要编舞：DAMIEN JALET 麦当娜造型师：RITA MELSSEN 衣橱设计：DOLCE&GABBANA GLOBAL造型师：AKEEM SMITH GOOD FOR THE SOUL 编舞和造型：YBDG 制作设计师：ARTHUR DE BORMAN 后期制作主管：CLEMENCE CUVELIER 后期制作：纪念版编辑 WILL TOWN LAUREN FRIEDMAN DANNY TULL 调色师 ARTHUR PAUX NICOLAS GAUTIER MADONNA’S团队 MAVERICK 管理层 GUY OSEARY SARA ZAMBRENO GEORDON NICOL RACHEL GORDH TARA AHMADI 麦当娜的助理：VANESSA SIRAVO 麦当娜的摄影师：RICARDO GOMES 帮助我们回馈……提高马拉维 http://www.raisemalawi.org/ 光之基金会 http://www.rayoflight.org/ 留在与麦当娜接触… https://madonna.com https://instagram.com/madonna https://tiktok.com/@madonna https://x.com/madonna https://facebook.com/madonna https://www.madonna.com/newsletter 麦当娜频道是麦当娜的官方 YouTube 主页。作为有史以来最畅销的女唱片艺术家，麦当娜继续通过她的艺术、音乐、激进主义和人道主义领导力在世界上留下不可磨灭的印记。麦当娜不断突破界限
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
